heading: Today
text: Morning rain and showers through NH in eastern VT, tapering off west of the Green Mountains and through Quebec, where periods of sun develop, expanding east into the Berkshires and VT.  Highs 60 to 65, except upper 50s east of the Green Mountains.  Winds light, becoming northeast to north less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A few localized evening showers east ending.  Gradual clearing overnight, and some patches of valley fog forming.  Lows in the low to mid 40s.  Winds light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Areas of fog burning off to sunshine, mixing with clouds from the west in the afternoon.  Warmer.  Highs in the low to mid 70s.  Winds light, becoming west to southwest near 10 mph, more southerly in the Champlain Valley, gusting 20 to 30 mph.
